audit_items.proof_trace: The 50% threshold is enforced at overflow_lru_cache.rs:622 before reconstruction: `if received_column_count < total_column_count / 2 { return No("not enough columns") }`. This guard is the only path to kzg.recover_cells_and_compute_kzg_proofs, ensuring recovery never proceeds with fewer than CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB/2 cells.
